title: Creative Collectible Character Packaging Poster

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Extreme close-up beauty portrait built around adult high-fashion beauty subject with calm direct gaze and sculptural elegance, clear blue eyes, delicate intricate silver jewelry around the neck and ears, dirty blonde hair in a sleek center-parted low bun with high-shine finish, and dewy clean-beauty makeup with clear lip gloss and shimmering champagne eyeshadow. Subject: adult high-fashion beauty subject with calm direct gaze and sculptural elegance appears in an extreme face-and-neck close-up with clear blue eyes, dirty blonde hair in a sleek center-parted low bun with high-shine finish, dewy clean-beauty makeup with clear lip gloss and shimmering champagne eyeshadow, and delicate intricate silver jewelry around the neck and ears as the visible beauty and accessory focus. Scene: Deep charcoal studio background kept minimal so the face, neck, hair edges, and jewelry reflections remain the entire visual focus. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Extreme face-and-neck crop, blue or cool-toned eyes, delicate silver jewelry, sleek low bun or chignon, dewy gloss makeup, champagne shimmer, charcoal background, and dramatic rim light. Fixed source details: Style Tags: Sweet but Cool / Confident / Unstoppable. Style: High-fashion beauty editorial photography with ultra-sharp jewelry detail, lifelike skin texture, refined glossy makeup, and polished magazine cover finish. Color Palette: Fixed deep charcoal background, silver jewelry highlights, cool eye tones from clear blue eyes, champagne shimmer, clear gloss reflections, and neutral skin tones. Lighting: Strong dramatic rim lighting against the charcoal background with crisp highlights on jewelry, lips, hair edges, cheekbones, and neck contours. Camera: Macro beauty portrait crop with shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes, lips, jewelry reflections, and individual hair edges. Materials: Silver jewelry, glossed lips, shimmering eyeshadow, high-shine hair, skin texture, and reflective metal details remain crisp. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Beauty Editorial Closeup 4 Variant 02

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Extreme close-up beauty portrait built around adult high-fashion beauty subject with calm direct gaze and sculptural elegance, clear blue eyes, delicate intricate silver jewelry around the neck and ears, dirty blonde hair in a sleek center-parted low bun with high-shine finish, and dewy clean-beauty makeup with clear lip gloss and shimmering champagne eyeshadow. Subject: adult high-fashion beauty subject with calm direct gaze and sculptural elegance appears in an extreme face-and-neck close-up with clear blue eyes, dirty blonde hair in a sleek center-parted low bun with high-shine finish, dewy clean-beauty makeup with clear lip gloss and shimmering champagne eyeshadow, and delicate intricate silver jewelry around the neck and ears as the visible beauty and accessory focus. Scene: Deep charcoal studio background kept minimal so the face, neck, hair edges, and jewelry reflections remain the entire visual focus. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Extreme face-and-neck crop, blue or cool-toned eyes, delicate silver jewelry, sleek low bun or chignon, dewy gloss makeup, champagne shimmer, charcoal background, and dramatic rim light. Fixed source details: Style Tags: Dreamy / Sweet Edge / Unstoppable. Style: High-fashion beauty editorial photography with ultra-sharp jewelry detail, lifelike skin texture, refined glossy makeup, and polished magazine cover finish. Color Palette: Fixed deep charcoal background, silver jewelry highlights, cool eye tones from clear blue eyes, champagne shimmer, clear gloss reflections, and neutral skin tones. Lighting: Strong dramatic rim lighting against the charcoal background with crisp highlights on jewelry, lips, hair edges, cheekbones, and neck contours. Camera: Macro beauty portrait crop with shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes, lips, jewelry reflections, and individual hair edges. Materials: Silver jewelry, glossed lips, shimmering eyeshadow, high-shine hair, skin texture, and reflective metal details remain crisp. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

promptTranslations.en:
Generate a 4:5 vertical, high-fidelity creative character packaging box poster—designed to resemble a premium collectible figurine box, optimized for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) cover visuals.

The central subject is an East Asian woman aged 20–26: clearly adult, with a 'sweet-yet-cool' refined facial structure—delicate but natural, neither childlike nor influencer-typical. Her expression balances confidence and a faint, sophisticated smile—conveying both charm and cool detachment. Hair is styled in a voluminous high ponytail, with soft face-framing strands and gently curled ends—evoking K-pop group energy and streetwise trendiness.

Her physique emphasizes natural, harmonious proportions: sculpted shoulder–neck lines, defined yet tasteful bust and waist contours, and elegant leg definition—all achieved through intentional garment tailoring and poised stance. Styling remains fashion-forward, restrained, and elevated—never exaggerated, vulgar, or sexualized.

Outfit: black cropped top + black leather mini-skirt + black short jacket. Top is a fitted sleeveless vest or delicate-strapped crop; jacket is a black leather biker-style short coat, optionally draped casually over one shoulder to amplify the sweet-cool duality. Skirt is high-waisted black leather; paired with black ankle socks and chunky platform boots/shoes. Overall look delivers collectible character appeal—trendy, iconic, and covetable.

The entire composition adopts a 'character packaging box' concept: she stands centered within a transparent blister-pack display area—like a limited-edition fashion figurine. The clear thermoformed plastic shell must be visibly crisp, with authentic surface reflections, sharp highlight edges, and precise body-contouring mold structure surrounding her.

Packaging layout is fully realized: left-side vertical brand info panel, top 'Limited Edition' badge, right-side accessory compartment, bottom 'Outfit Card', barcode, collector number, Style Tag, and character mini-card—all integrated as functional, premium packaging modules. This must read as a real collectible toy/fashion doll box—not a portrait photo.

Right-side accessory compartment is fully detailed, with each item in its own transparent grid cell: black mini shoulder bag, black sunglasses, purple perfume bottle, pink-purple lip gloss, black compact powder case, instant-print photo card / smartphone mini-card, and spare black platform boots/shoes. All accessories are neatly arranged with retail-display precision.

Dominant color scheme: lavender purple + black + silver-white. Left info panel is lavender purple; main box surface carries semi-transparent purple blister-film texture; borders and typography use silver-white, cool metallic tones, and subtle white highlights. Overall mood: dreamy, sweet-cool, fashion-forward, meticulously refined.

Packaging text may include:
COLLECTIBLE FIGURE DREAM MUSE COLLECTION
LIMITED EDITION
1/7 SCALE
STYLE TAG
Sweet but Cool
Confident
Unstoppable
OUTFIT CARD
MINI SHOULDER BAG
SUNGLASSES
PERFUME
LIP GLOSS
COMPACT
SMARTPHONE / PHOTOCARD
EXTRA SHOES
barcode

Lighting mimics premium packaging photography: bright, clean, with crisp plastic reflections, clear facial definition, realistic leather highlights, and tangible thickness/refraction in the transparent blister shell. Overall impression: high-end collectible energy, Xiaohongshu cover-ready, fashion-doll packaging authenticity.

Image requirements: unambiguous central figure, complete packaging architecture, crystal-clear blister shell, fully equipped accessory grid, elevated typographic hierarchy, cohesive color system, strong collectible fashion identity, bright yet dreamy lavender ambiance.
product: architectural perfume bottle. fictional brand: Vellum Atelier. campaign mood: minimal high-fashion campaign mood. color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. typography: visible headline: "THE NEW SIGNAL".
